SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class Includes

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.Includes
public class Includes extends Object
Encapsulates 2 lists (one for LDT-include, one for "normal" includes) containing the filenames parsed in the include-section of a KeYFile. name2Source maps the entries of both lists to the corresponding RuleSources.
